title: stellaria pubera subsp. typica
intro: Stellaria pubera subsp. typica, also known as the wood star or wood star chickweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stellaria pubera subsp. typica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves or ointments to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
